heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 9, 1955, ch. 690, § 4(3)69 Stat. 625
label: 188 Repealed. ,Aug. 9, 1955, ch. 690, § 4(3)69 Stat. 625
notes: Section, , , forbade striking by Government employees, required discharge of striking employee and forfeiture of his civil-service status, and made him ineligible for employment for three years. See sections 3333 and 7311 of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, and , Crimes and Criminal Procedure.act June 23, 1947, ch. 120, title III, § 30561 Stat. 160section 1918 of Title 18
